message: chore(version): update build metadata after formatting

files.patch:
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
 // This file is auto-generated by the build script. Do not edit manually.
 enum Version {
     static let current = "Peekaboo 3.0.0"
-    static let gitCommit = "2e16cc32-dirty"
-    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-14 02:23:14 +0000"
+    static let gitCommit = "06d4392f-dirty"
+    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-14 02:38:31 +0000"
     static let gitBranch = "main"
-    static let buildDate = "2025-11-14T02:28:31+00:00"
+    static let buildDate = "2025-11-14T02:38:40+00:00"
     
     static var fullVersion: String {
         return "\(current) (\(gitBranch)/\(gitCommit), built: \(buildDate))"
